title: MCTerra
description:
Kid: Mom can I have Terraria?
Mom: We have Terraria at home.
Terrraria at home:
body:
A Terraria-based mod. It can be played alongside the default Minecraft, as it has its own dimension. Terraframe - Portal Frame
Wind and Steel - Igniter, use this to go to Mineterra
Fire and Steel - Igniter, use this to go to Underworld
F-[Frame], A-[Air], use [Wind and Steel] or [Fire and Steel] to ignite F F F F
F A A F
F A A F
F A A F
F F F F
Swords and Staves:
Disabled in Vanilla Minecraft Overworld/Nether/End, but works on other dimensions, with exception of Phaseblade and Phasesabers Mana:
Fallen Stars will spawn near you at night while in Terra Overworld.
Get 5 stars to craft a mana crystal (+20 Max mana)
Maximum mana is currently 100
Mana regen every second: (1 + (Total Mana / 100))
How to spawn Empress of Light:
Find a Prismatic Lacewing, and kill it (dont let other mobs kill it otherwise itll not spawn)
Also, use a sword, killing it with a bow and arrow doesnt register for some reason
BE SURE TO HAVE AT LEAST FULL NETHERITE ARMOR Acorn & Sakura sapling planting mechanic:
Right click on grass/dirt/mud/snow/sand with an acorn to spawn a tree
Gem mechanic:
Power a Pearlstone using Redstone to spawn a crystal (5 min grow time)

Glowing Empress of Light and Prismatic Lacewing ![EOL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZmgW7qys/images/a84e74df80654fbb8bc67b3c5b9323118c8d6b3c.png 'Glowing Empress of Light and Prismatic Lacewing') Milestone: 500 Total Downloads [Aug-16-2024]
Milestone: 1000 Total Downloads [Jan-3-2025]
THANK YOU GUYS!!! Updates less often (spontaneous bursts of energy)
